invariantTitle: Evidence-Driven Recurrence Prevention and Governed Innovation
architecturalPrinciples: A materially evidenced and certified failure must not be unknowingly repeated under materially equivalent conditions.
Every material failure, correction, operator override, regression, and improvement opportunity must be capable of producing an evidence-linked learning signal.
One observation is not automatically a certified lesson.
Model output is candidate intelligence only.
Control Plane retains promotion and override authority.
Planned behavior must not be represented as certified or active until implemented and proven.

learningLanes.definition: Collect bounded evidence without claiming it is true, reusable, or active.
Correct a demonstrated failure while preserving source evidence for the original failure and correction.
Compare a candidate against a baseline and require measurable evidence before certification or promotion.
Apply a certified pattern to a related context only inside declared applicability boundaries.
Retrieve known failure paths, lessons, prevention rules, alternatives, and overrides before materially similar work.
Propose a materially different approach, capability, authority, dependency, source boundary, or risk class under stronger governance.

prohibitedShortcuts: A model-generated statement cannot become an active lesson by itself.
One failure cannot become a certified lesson by itself.
A casual operator statement cannot become a reusable rule by itself.
Successful parsing cannot certify a lesson.
Capability completion cannot certify a lesson unless the lesson lifecycle is satisfied.
A candidate that appears better cannot activate without baseline comparison, certification, promotion authority, and rollback readiness.
Known certified failure paths cannot be repeated blindly.

lessonLifecycle.historyPolicy: Lessons may be superseded but not silently erased; failed and rejected lessons remain inspectable.

behaviors: block materially equivalent known failure paths
warn and require governed review for uncertain equivalence
select a certified alternative when authorized and applicable

innovationLifecycle.activationPolicy: Innovation cannot activate itself and cannot be promoted automatically.

operatorOverridePolicy.historyPolicy: Overrides do not erase failures, lessons, prevention rules, or superseded history.

contextMatchingPolicy.relatedButDifferent: scoped application with applicability and non-applicability explanation required
contextMatchingPolicy.knownCertifiedFailurePath: must block, warn for governed review, or select a certified alternative

11.name: Desktop Operator
gates: Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for known failure patterns
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for applicable lessons
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for prevention warnings
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for certified alternatives
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for operator overrides
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for superseded lessons
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for improvement proposals
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for innovation proposals
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for supporting evidence
Desktop Operator visual contract reserves governed surfaces for applicability and non-applicability explanations
Desktop Operator may render honest empty states until Runtime support exists

12.name: First Certified Studio
gates: Studio produces evidence-linked operator corrections
Studio produces evidence-linked failed-output signals
Studio produces evidence-linked evaluation failures
Studio produces evidence-linked improvement opportunities
Studio produces evidence-linked innovation opportunities
Studio does not automatically promote interaction history into reusable rules

13.name: Integrated Offline Loop
gates: Integrated loop performs a learning preflight before capability or approach selection
Preflight retrieves applicable certified lessons
Preflight retrieves known failure patterns
Preflight retrieves prevention rules
Preflight retrieves certified alternatives
Preflight retrieves active overrides
Preflight writes bounded evidence without certifying lessons
Preflight distinguishes applicable, uncertain, out-of-scope, certified-alternative, and override paths
Capability and Studio selection are blocked until preflight completes

14.name: Learning Generalization, Recurrence Prevention, and Innovation Proof
acceptanceProof: proof that model output does not automatically become a lesson

15.name: Clean-Machine Offline Restart Proof
gates: failure records persist after restart
certified lessons persist after restart
prevention rules persist after restart
lesson scopes persist after restart
superseded lessons persist after restart
overrides persist after restart
innovation proposals persist after restart
known-failure prevention works after restart with no public internet

16.name: Portable Base MVP Acceptance
portableAcceptanceScenario: visible explanation and evidence in Desktop Operator

milestone14CanonicalName: Milestone 14 - Learning Generalization, Recurrence Prevention, and Innovation Proof
milestone16PortableAcceptanceScenario: visible explanation and evidence in Desktop Operator

requires: no silent loss of learning history
new capabilities must preserve recurrence-prevention preflight hooks
innovation remains governed and distinct from learning
Control Plane remains promotion and override authority
